phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q only — throw the nails at wave contacts and bank the mark stacks. You are a melee mana champ at level 1: chip, don't brawl.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: E online — blink-auto through a 2-stack target is a real chunk, but your escape is now spent. Trade only when the exit math works.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: W's speed makes the E-in stick. Stack nails, ignite the soul, and take the first genuine trade of the lane on YOUR timer.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Q max ramps — the recast slows chain and every consumed mark refunds mana. Chip Anivia toward half; that's where your passive starts doing the accounting.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Purgatory online — a totem that turns 'almost dead' into 'dead'. Anyone at the wave below a quarter HP is now a soul waiting for the seal.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Lich Bane spike: blink-auto now double-dips Spellblade on every mark consume. This is your kill window — cash it before their second item answers.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Sealed souls keep raising the execute floor — you're a cleanup engine now. Enter fights second, blink the resets, and let the totem do the arithmetic.

phases.why: Sealed souls keep raising the execute floor — you're a cleanup engine now. Enter fights second, blink the resets, and let the totem do the arithmetic.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q only — throw the nails at wave contacts and bank the mark stacks. You are a melee mana champ at level 1: chip, don't brawl.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: E online — blink-auto through a 2-stack target is a real chunk, but your escape is now spent. Trade only when the exit math works.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: W's speed makes the E-in stick. Stack nails, ignite the soul, and take the first genuine trade of the lane on YOUR timer.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Q max ramps — the recast slows chain and every consumed mark refunds mana. Chip Neeko toward half; that's where your passive starts doing the accounting.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Purgatory online — a totem that turns 'almost dead' into 'dead'. Anyone at the wave below a quarter HP is now a soul waiting for the seal.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Lich Bane spike: blink-auto now double-dips Spellblade on every mark consume. This is your kill window — cash it before their second item answers.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Sealed souls keep raising the execute floor — you're a cleanup engine now. Enter fights second, blink the resets, and let the totem do the arithmetic.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q only — throw the nails at wave contacts and bank the mark stacks. You are a melee mana champ at level 1: chip, don't brawl.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: E online — blink-auto through a 2-stack target is a real chunk, but your escape is now spent. Trade only when the exit math works.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: Full kit: W's speed makes the E-in stick. Stack nails, ignite the soul, and take the first genuine trade of the lane on YOUR timer.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: Q max ramps — the recast slows chain and every consumed mark refunds mana. Chip Locke toward half; that's where your passive starts doing the accounting.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Purgatory online — a totem that turns 'almost dead' into 'dead'. Anyone at the wave below a quarter HP is now a soul waiting for the seal.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: Lich Bane spike: blink-auto now double-dips Spellblade on every mark consume. This is your kill window — cash it before their second item answers.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Sealed souls keep raising the execute floor — you're a cleanup engine now. Enter fights second, blink the resets, and let the totem do the arithmetic.
